title: Sweet & Creamy Fold Yellow Pepper
description: A delightful brunch dish featuring sweet and creamy flavors with a touch of spiciness in every fold of yellow pepper. Perfect for those looking to enjoy a savory yet comforting meal on a chilly morning.

ingredients.name: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Slice the yellow bell peppers into strips, about 1/2 inch thick. Season them with salt and pepper on both sides.
In a large skillet or frying pan over medium heat, melt the butter until it starts to foam slightly.
Add the sliced yellow peppers to the melted butter and cook for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they become tender but still maintain their shape.
Pour in the heavy cream, Parmesan cheese, and lemon juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Increase heat to medium-high and bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce the heat to low and let it cook for about 10 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Taste test and adjust seasoning with additional salt and pepper if needed. Serve hot as desired garnished with fresh parsley.
